commit.message:
v2: Fix scraper extracting platform-level links instead of individual job URLs

Problem: v1's generic extractor grabbed navigation links ("产品与技术"),
category labels ("技术运营类"), and JD text fragments as job entries.
ByteDance returned 0 real jobs, Tencent had no URLs, MiniMax had 30+
duplicate fragments.

Fix:
- Add platform-specific extractors for Feishu, ByteDance, Tencent
- URL pattern filtering: only keep /position/{ID}, /job_detail/{ID} etc
- Click-through for SPA cards that use click handlers instead of <a> tags
- Auto-pagination (default 3 pages)
- Proper deduplication by URL or title
- Structured field extraction (title, location, department, jobType)

New difficulty section added to README (Difficulty #8).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 修復職缺匹配推薦全部顯示 46 分的 bug

問題原因：
1. Skills 解析 bug：候選人技能是逗號分隔字串（如 "IFRS, GAAP, SAP ERP"），
   但 JSON.parse() 解析失敗後直接設為空陣列 []，導致技能比對永遠為 0
2. Source 比對 bug：用 === 'linkedin' 嚴格比對，無法匹配 "LinkedIn 搜尋" 等
   含額外文字的來源值，導致 profileScore 永遠是預設的 40

修復結果：
- skillScore 50（無技能）× 0.6 + profileScore 40 × 0.4 = 46 → 現在能正確匹配
- routes-api.js: 修復 job-rankings API 的技能解析和來源比對
- talentSourceService.js: 修復 talent sourcing 的相同邏輯

Fix scene-gen handle positioning — edges now enter at correct left-edge points

Removed position:relative overrides that caused React Flow to miscalculate
handle positions. Labels now float independently, handles sit on node edge.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix model picker: persist selection, honor Default, show per-message model

- Add getSessionModelMode/saveSessionModelMode across MMKV storage layers
  (native + web + storage_service + draft_storage) to persist the model
  selection per session, mirroring the existing permissionMode pattern
- chat_screen: load saved model on open (falling back to session.modelMode
  from the server), and save whenever the user changes the picker — so the
  choice survives navigation away and back
- sync_service: remove storedModelMode fallback in effectiveModelMode so
  that choosing "Default" in the picker genuinely sends no model override
  instead of silently re-using the session's previous server-stored model
- message_processor: extract agentMsg['model'] from Claude API responses
  and attach it as 'model' on every generated agent message map
- message_widget: fall back to messageData['model'] in the tap-to-detail
  sheet so assistant messages now show which model was actually used

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

feat: multi-catch drop event and normalised trivia answer detection

Drop event now rewards up to 5 players with decreasing Stardust ranges
(10-12, 8-10, 6-8, 4-6, 1-4) rather than a single winner. Trivia answer
matching now strips punctuation before comparing so answers with irregular
capitalisation or special characters are accepted correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: dynamic import $app/navigation to fix Safari TDZ error

Replace static import of invalidate from $app/navigation with dynamic
import to break circular dependency that causes "Cannot access
'universal' before initialization" on Safari/WebKit (iPad).

$app/navigation can be bundled into the same Vite chunk as the route
entry module. WebKit/JavaScriptCore may initialize modules in a
different order than V8, triggering a TDZ error on the 'universal'
variable that holds the route's load function reference.

feat(crypto+oid4vp+wallet): Block U + Block E + Block G — Unlinkability, OID4VP Bridge, Wallet Tests

Block U — Spec 111 Phase 2 Unlinkability:
- U-01: generatePairwiseDIDFromMasterKey — HKDF-SHA-256 from wallet master key (deterministic per verifier+nonce)
- U-02: resolveDidPeer0 — inline did:peer:0 resolution, P-256 pub key from DID, no network
- U-03/U-04: cross-verifier isolation + key shredding tests (23 tests in unlinkability.test.ts)
- DIDResolver: did:peer:0z dispatch branch (no cache, no network)
- fix: Uint8Array<ArrayBuffer> casts for tsc strict build
- fix: pairwise-did.test.ts 1000-DID timeout 30s→60s (CPU load under turbo)

Block E — OID4VP Policy Bridge (E-04):
- policy-bridge.ts: executeOID4VPFlow (parse→eval→prompt→cred select→build response)
- mapRequestToPolicyInput + validateRequestCompatibility (allowlist, max-claims preflight)
- fix: parseAuthorizationRequest passes client_metadata through to AuthorizationRequest
- policy-bridge.test.ts: 19 tests covering all verdict paths + evaluator input validation

Block G — Wallet PWA Tests (24 tests):
- DocumentService.test.ts: 10 tests (hashFile, determinism, SHA-256 empty, createProofOfExistence)
- PrivacyAuditService.test.ts: 9 tests (UUID, tracker shape, score 0-100, Windows detection)
- App.test.tsx: 5 tests (title, credential card, demo section, button IDs)

feat: Bambu 3MF auto-wrapping in reslice_and_print pipeline

Bambu printers need gcode wrapped in a 3MF with proprietary start/end
sequences. The reslice_and_print pipeline now auto-detects Bambu adapters
and wraps gcode as 3MF before uploading, matching slice_and_print behavior.

- Temperature overrides forwarded to 3MF metadata (hotend_temp, bed_temp)
- local_file_path passed to start_print for MD5 + AMS auto-detection
- Graceful fallback to raw gcode if wrapping fails
- Non-Bambu adapters (OctoPrint, Moonraker, Serial) unaffected

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(crop): prevent OOM crash when loading large images

Problem:
- App crashed when taking photos or selecting images from gallery
- BitmapFactory.decodeFile() loaded full-size images into memory
- Large photos (5MB+) caused OutOfMemoryError

Solutions:
1. Added bitmap sampling to load images at reduced resolution
   - decodeSampledBitmapFromFile() with inSampleSize calculation
   - Maximum display size: 2048x2048 pixels
   - Reduces memory usage by 75%+ for large images

2. Fixed potential crash in cropAndReturn()
   - Added bounds checking (width/height >= 1)
   - Added try-catch for Bitmap.createBitmap()
   - Fallback to original bitmap if cropping fails

3. Proper bitmap memory management
   - Recycle cropped bitmap after use
   - Only recycle if it's not the original bitmap

Technical Details:
- First decode: inJustDecodeBounds=true (get dimensions only)
- Calculate optimal inSampleSize (power of 2)
- Second decode: load downsampled image
- Memory savings: ~4x for 4000x3000 photos

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add agent session metrics to dashboard, update docs (#34)

* fix: skip LLM safety check for context briefs

Context briefs are posted to the private shadow repo and intentionally
include diverse vector search results. The LLM relevance check was
rejecting briefs with loosely related issues, which is the expected
behavior for a discovery-oriented format. Structural safety check
still applies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix CORS: add X-App-Version to manual preflight handlers in auth_routes

The global Flask-CORS config (dakeva_api.py) already allowed X-App-Version,
but auth_routes.py had 13 manual OPTIONS handlers that only allowed
Content-Type,Authorization,X-Tenant-ID. Since commit #601 added the
X-App-Version header to apiFetch(), the browser blocked all auth requests
from the PWA (tenant switching, tenant list) because the preflight response
didn't include the new header.

commit.message:
fix: show Overpass rate-limit wait times and fall back to random points

When Overpass returns 429/504, queryOverpass now checks the status
endpoint for actual slot availability and shows "retrying in Xs..."
in the loading indicator. If all retries fail, POI/road searches
gracefully fall back to random geometric points so the app stays
usable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 根治 SyntaxError 逃脫問題

問題根因：
1. pdf-parse 在解析部分 PDF 的 XMP metadata 時，內部呼叫 JSON.parse
   並拋出原生 SyntaxError。雖然外層有 catch，但 `throw err` 重新拋出
   原始 SyntaxError，Convex 因此標示為「Uncaught SyntaxError」。
2. 即使有保護，response.json() 路徑仍可能在舊版部署中被觸發。

修復方式：
- 新增 safeJsonParse() 輔助函式，所有 JSON.parse 統一走這條路，
  失敗時拋出 Error（而非原生 SyntaxError）
- pdfParse() 加上獨立 try/catch + Promise.resolve() 包裝
- 外層 catch 改為 throw new Error(message)，永不重拋原始錯誤物件
- 加上空白 PDF 文字的友善提示（掃描版圖片 PDF 不支援）
